task.objective: Move the owned Hopper BF16 kernel into the 80-120 TFLOPS band on H100 while tracking cuBLASLt as the ceiling control.

baseline.name: hopper_tensor_core_bf16_perf
baseline.description: Hopper BF16 baseline perf lane at 4096^3 with reference disabled to isolate steady-state Tensor Core throughput.

control.name: hopper_cublaslt_bf16
control.description: Hopper cuBLASLt BF16 GEMM control lane for measuring the hardware-native library ceiling before a custom TMA/WGMMA implementation lands.

profile_protocol: python3 kernels/lab/kernel_lab.py --nvcc nvcc bench hopper_tensor_core_bf16_perf --phase compile --repeats 1 --warmup 0 --progress
python3 kernels/lab/kernel_lab.py --nvcc nvcc bench hopper_tensor_core_bf16_perf --phase run --repeats 5 --warmup 1 --progress
python3 kernels/lab/kernel_lab.py --nvcc nvcc bench hopper_cublaslt_bf16 --phase compile --repeats 1 --warmup 0 --progress
python3 kernels/lab/kernel_lab.py --nvcc nvcc bench hopper_cublaslt_bf16 --phase run --repeats 5 --warmup 1 --progress

python3 kernels/lab/kernel_lab.py --nvcc nvcc bench-suite --phase compile --repeats 1 --warmup 0 --label hopper-sm90-80-120-candidates-compile --progress --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_perf --name hopper_cublaslt_bf16 --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_wide

python3 kernels/lab/kernel_lab.py --nvcc nvcc bench-suite --phase run --repeats 5 --warmup 1 --label hopper-sm90-80-120-candidates --progress --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_perf --name hopper_cublaslt_bf16 --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async --name hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_wide
benchmark_plan.promotion_rule: winner becomes next baseline for matching task_kind/backend/arch

result.notes: Promote async wide overlap lane after zero-diff 512^3 correctness and 136.826 TFLOPS steady-state on H100. Remaining gap to cuBLASLt indicates the next move is Hopper-native TMA/WGMMA rather than more WMMA retuning.

winner.name: hopper_tensor_core_bf16_async_wide
winner.description: Hopper BF16 async WMMA lane widened to a 64x128x32 CTA so each stage amortizes more scheduling overhead before the WGMMA/TMA path lands.

promoted_baseline.notes: Promote async wide overlap lane after zero-diff 512^3 correctness and 136.826 TFLOPS steady-state on H100. Remaining gap to cuBLASLt indicates the next move is Hopper-native TMA/WGMMA rather than more WMMA retuning.
